Or, massage several drops into face and neck, focusing on scars, dryness or sun damage. Patch-test before use.

Nuxe Huile Prodigieuse® Florale (100ml)

• Multi-purpose oil can be applied directly to the face for firming and firming, or mixed with foundation makeup. Say no to clogging!

• Vitamin E Complex: Brightening

title: 100% original HABA Whitening squalane Facial Oil 15ml / 30ml made in japan original
detail_text: Osmotic Vitamin C derivative has been added to Squalane in HABA’s original formula. Penetrates deep inside skin by Squalane’s vehicle effect and actively works against free radical and Melanin that causes dark spots. HABA’s first Squalane for whitening. Active ingredient for whitening, the osmotic Vitamin C derivative reaches deep inside skin helped by Squalane’s vehicle effect. In addition to Squalane’s moisturizing effect, skin softening effect and skin barrier effect, whitening effect by osmotic Vitamin C can be expected. Contains Vitamin E that has a blood circulation improving effect. For those who tend to be allergic to Vitamin C, please recommend a patch test first. What is Osmotic Vitamin C Derivative? – Has a better permeability than water soluble Vitamin C derivative. Penetrates deep down to skin, especially through pores. Permeates widely and deeply to lower part than stratus corneum and works for long hours. – The functions of tightening pores, control the sebum secretion, works for Collagen & Elastin are well expected due to this Vitamin C derivative. Functions of Osmotic Vitamin C Derivative： – Controls free radical that causes suntan and dark spots. – Controls the activity of Tyrosinase, an enzyme that produces melanin. How to Use： When skin is still wet after applying enough toner, take one (or a few) drops on palm and blends on palms. Then gently apply to entire face evenly, as if you wrap your face by both hands. * Same usage as Squalane. No need to use both together. Usage amount： 1 or a few drops (1 or 2 drops for who use for the first time) Adjust the amount by skin condition. Handling and Storage： Avoid extremely high temperature and direct sunlight during storage.
detail_html:
Osmotic Vitamin C derivative has been added to Squalane in HABA’s original formula.





Penetrates deep inside skin by Squalane’s vehicle effect and actively works against free radical and Melanin that causes dark spots.





HABA’s first Squalane for whitening. Active ingredient for whitening, the osmotic Vitamin C derivative reaches deep inside skin helped by Squalane’s vehicle effect.





In addition to Squalane’s moisturizing effect, skin softening effect and skin barrier effect, whitening effect by osmotic Vitamin C can be expected.





Contains Vitamin E that has a blood circulation improving effect.





For those who tend to be allergic to Vitamin C, please recommend a patch test first.





What is Osmotic Vitamin C Derivative?





– Has a better permeability than water soluble Vitamin C derivative. Penetrates deep down to skin, especially through pores. Permeates widely and deeply to lower part than stratus corneum and works for long hours.





– The functions of tightening pores, control the sebum secretion, works for Collagen & Elastin are well expected due to this Vitamin C derivative.









Functions of Osmotic Vitamin C Derivative：





– Controls free radical that causes suntan and dark spots.





– Controls the activity of Tyrosinase, an enzyme that produces melanin.









How to Use：





When skin is still wet after applying enough toner, take one (or a few) drops on palm and blends on palms. Then gently apply to entire face evenly, as if you wrap your face by both hands.





* Same usage as Squalane. No need to use both together.





Usage amount：





1 or a few drops (1 or 2 drops for who use for the first time)





Adjust the amount by skin condition.





Handling and Storage：





Avoid extremely high temperature and direct sunlight during storage.

title: 100% Pure Organic Paracress Facial Oil - Paracress Facial Oil, Anti-Aging Moisturizing Essential Oil, Reduce Fine Lines and Wrinkles, Tightening and Moisturizing Essential Oil, Nourish and Lift The Skin, Moisturize Face Essence Oil
detail_text: 【Powerful Anti-Aging Formula】Crafted with organic Paracress (Spilanthes Acmella Oleracea), this facial oil effectively reduces the appearance of wrinkles and fine lines, leaving your skin looking firm and youthful. 【Deep Hydration & Moisture Lock】Infused with MCT oil, this lightweight essential oil deeply nourishes and locks in moisture, ensuring your skin stays soft, smooth, and refreshed throughout the day. 【Natural Blemish Minimizer】Formulated with a potent blend of botanical extracts, it targets spots and blemishes, enhancing overall skin clarity。 【Pure & Organic Skincare Solution】Made from organic, plant-based ingredients, free from harsh chemicals, this facial oil is suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin, providing gentle yet effective skincare benefits. 【Convenient Usage】Simply add 3 to 5 drops of the essential oil to the palm of your hand, gently rub your hands together to warm the oil slightly, place your hands on both sides of your face, hold for five seconds, and then gently massage to enjoy a soothing skincare experience. 1. Cleanse your face thoroughly and pat dry. 2. Apply 2-3 drops of the oil to your fingertips. 3. Gently massage into your face and neck in upward circular motions. 4. Use daily in the morning and evening for best results. 5. Pair with your favorite sunscreen during the day to protect your skin. For external use only. Avoid direct contact with eyes. Perform a patch test before use. Discontinue if irritation occurs. Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. #productdescription h3 {margin: 0.75em 0.0px 0.375em -1.0px;}
detail_html:
【Powerful Anti-Aging Formula】Crafted with organic Paracress (Spilanthes Acmella Oleracea), this facial oil effectively reduces the appearance of wrinkles and fine lines, leaving your skin looking firm and youthful.
【Deep Hydration & Moisture Lock】Infused with MCT oil, this lightweight essential oil deeply nourishes and locks in moisture, ensuring your skin stays soft, smooth, and refreshed throughout the day.
【Natural Blemish Minimizer】Formulated with a potent blend of botanical extracts, it targets spots and blemishes, enhancing overall skin clarity。
【Pure & Organic Skincare Solution】Made from organic, plant-based ingredients, free from harsh chemicals, this facial oil is suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin, providing gentle yet effective skincare benefits.
【Convenient Usage】Simply add 3 to 5 drops of the essential oil to the palm of your hand, gently rub your hands together to warm the oil slightly, place your hands on both sides of your face, hold for five seconds, and then gently massage to enjoy a soothing skincare experience.

  • 1. Cleanse your face thoroughly and pat dry.
  • 2. Apply 2-3 drops of the oil to your fingertips.
  • 3. Gently massage into your face and neck in upward circular motions.
  • 4. Use daily in the morning and evening for best results.
  • 5. Pair with your favorite sunscreen during the day to protect your skin.
  • For external use only. Avoid direct contact with eyes.
  • Perform a patch test before use. Discontinue if irritation occurs.
  • Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.

title: [THE ORDINARY] The Ordinary 100% Organic Cold-Pressed Moroccan Argan Oil 30ml
detail_text: Nourish hair and skin with the 100% Organic Cold-Pressed Argan Oil from The Ordinary. Utilising a pure Moroccan Argan Seed oil formula, the oil is rich in fatty acids, vitamins and carotenes, which combine to deliver hydrating and nourishing properties to skin, hair, lips and nails. Working effectively on skin, the oil is rich in Vitamin E, which is able to combat dryness by providing essential moisture. Skin is visibly healthy and areas of dehydration are relieved. The oil is also effective on hair. Working to condition locks, the formula strengths the fiber and seeks to restore dry and damaged hair, whilst adding shine. Arriving in its pure form, the oil will offer optimum benefits, leaving skin and nails visibly healthy and nourished. Direction Hair Application: Work through damp, clean hair daily or as needed. Skin Application: Apply a few drops to the entire face once daily or as needed.

title: Essano Collagen Boost Facial Oil 20ml
detail_text: Product Description: essano Collagen Boost Oil contains Schisandra Chinensis Berry and Rosehip Oil to deliver intense moisture to the upper layers, giving your skin a firmer and more elastic appearance in only 8 weeks. Features/Benefit: These ingredients are clinically proven to: • Improve the elasticity parameter and firmness of the skin by up to 28%* • Reinforce dynamic cohesion between the dermis and epidermis. • Increase Collagen XVII synthesis by up to 6x** • Animal Cruelty Free • Made in New Zealand • New Zealand #1 Natural Skincare Brand *in-vivo result **in-vitro result Ingredients: Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil*, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil*, Macadamia Integrifolia (Macadamia) Seed Oil*, Crambe Abyssinica Seed Oil, Rosa Canina (Rosehip) Fruit Oil*, Schisandra Chinensis Fruit Extract, Isoamyl Laurate, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Parfum (Fragrance), Citral, Citronellol, Geraniol, Limonene, Linalool. 99.7% of the total ingredients are of natural origin. *95.9% of the total ingredients are from organic farming. Directions: After cleansing and toning, add a couple of drops to your essano Collagen Boost Day Crème or Night Crème. Or, massage several drops into face and neck, focusing on scars, dryness or sun damage. Patch-test before use.

Hydrating Formula The hydrating formula of this oil deeply moisturizes the skin, leaving it soft, smooth, and supple. Facial and Eye Massage Designed for both facial and eye massage, it helps to reduce fine lines and wrinkles, leaving your skin looking younger and more radiant. Easy Application With its liquid consistency, this oil is easy to apply, ensuring a quick and efficient skincare routine.

product.desc:
Rose Essence Oil

Infused with rose essence, this facial oil provides a luxurious skincare experience, hydrating and nourishing the skin.

Hydrating Formula

The hydrating formula of this oil deeply moisturizes the skin, leaving it soft, smooth, and supple.

Facial and Eye Massage

Designed for both facial and eye massage, it helps to reduce fine lines and wrinkles, leaving your skin looking younger and more radiant.

Antioxidant Properties

Rich in antioxidants, this oil helps to protect your skin from environmental damage, keeping it healthy and glowing.

Easy Application

With its liquid consistency, this oil is easy to apply, ensuring a quick and efficient skincare routine.

title: ROUGH BEAUTY Everyday Facial Oil 15ml Glass Bottle
detail_text: The Everyday Facial Oil is formulated to hydrate and feel light on your skin, with sweet and earthy notes from geranium and palmarosa essential oils. High in oleic and linoleic acid from sweet almond and evening primrose oils, the facial oil moisturises and acts as an emollient, locking in moisture. It is also low on the comedogenic rating. Scent: sweet and earthy Texture: light Skin type: normal/sensitive/dry Use: Apply one to two drops onto cleansed skin or palm, massage oil into face gently until absorbed. Ingredients: Sweet almond oil, evening primrose oil, carrot seed oil, essential oils ( geranium [ Pelargonium graveolens ], palmarosa [ Cymbopogon martinii ], lavender [ Lavandula angustifolia ]) Volume: 15ml

The Everyday Facial Oil is formulated to hydrate and feel light on your skin, with sweet and earthy notes from geranium and palmarosa essential oils. High in oleic and linoleic acid from sweet almond and evening primrose oils, the facial oil moisturises and acts as an emollient, locking in moisture. It is also low on the comedogenic rating.


 


Scent: sweet and earthy


Texture: light


Skin type: normal/sensitive/dry



Use: Apply one to two drops onto cleansed skin or palm, massage oil into face gently until absorbed.


Ingredients: Sweet almond oil, evening primrose oil, carrot seed oil, essential oils (geranium [Pelargonium graveolens], palmarosa [Cymbopogon martinii], lavender [Lavandula angustifolia])


Volume: 15ml
